name: Flavor Savvy
description: Flavor Savvy helps you creatively use leftovers by suggesting gourmet recipes tailored to what you have in your fridge. Snap a photo of your ingredients, and the app uses AI to generate mouth-watering recipes, complete with cooking tips and pairing suggestions. Turn your excess into culinary masterpieces and reduce food waste with a new approach to cooking.
audience: Home cooks looking to minimize waste
